tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A offered to share their workload, but my own plan requires me to finish my section by 13:00. Given my low energy and high stress, I should decline this request.

goals.description: Complete and submit the teammate's share of the group project
goals.rationale: The task is due Monday at 19:00, has a soft deadline (allowing some buffer), but represents external work that must be finished to meet the shared project requirement.

goals.description: Verify submission of own task completion
goals.rationale: Own task progress is already at 1.0% with a matching soft deadline; finalizing ensures no accidental omission before the same time limit.

agent.last_reasoning: Prioritizes high-priority goal g1 (teammate's share) before deadline. Cross-domain side effect: teammate_A offered help, but accepting now risks their own completion; working independently ensures project success without immediate trust penalty.
